chunks: Letter Writing: Topic:-Letter write on topic write an resignation letter. From, Harsh Singh Junior Software Developer Meta Date : 17 March 2026 To, The Manager Meta Subject: Resignation from the position of Junior Developer Dear Sir/Madam, I would like to formally resign from my position as Junior Developer at Meta, effective from17 April. I am grateful for the opportunities and experience I have gained during my time with the organization. This decision has been made as I plan to pursue new opportunities that align with my career growth and professional development. I appreciate the support and guidance provided by the management and my colleagues.

I will ensure a smooth transition of my responsibilities during the notice period. Thank you for your cooperation and understanding. Yours sincerely, Harsh Singh (Junior Software Developer) Email Writing: Topic:-Write an email to professor requesting recommendation letter From: harsh.company@gmail.com To: teamMembers@gmail.com Subject: Request for recommendation letter Dear Professor, I hope you are doing well. I am writing to kindly request a letter of recommendation from you. Your guidance and teaching have greatly contributed to my academic development, and I believe your recommendation would strongly support my application.

I am currently applying for job, and a recommendation from you would help highlight my skills, dedication, and academic performance. Please let me know if you need any additional information such as my resume or academic details. I would be grateful for your support. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, Harsh Singh (Information Technology)
